title: Adult Mouse Liver Dissociation Protocol on Ice
author: Andrew Potter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yd2fs8e

steps.title: Dissect out liver tissue and immerse/transport in ice-cold PBS
steps.instruction: Dissect out liver tissue and immerse/transport in ice-cold PBS.

steps.title: Using sterile forceps, place tissue on petri dish on ice
steps.instruction: Using sterile forceps, place tissue on petri dish on ice. Remove excess DPBS using pipet. Mince tissue thoroughly on petri dish on ice (~2 min) until fine paste. Manipulate tissue with forceps while mincing with razor blade. 00:02:00, mince on ice

steps.title: Add 18 mg tissue to 1 mL trypsin enzyme mix
steps.instruction: Add 18 mg tissue to 1 mL trypsin enzyme mix. Shake tube vigorously to re-suspend tissue. undetermined, minced tissue

steps.title: Leave digest mix rotating at 4 °C for 3
steps.instruction: Leave digest mix rotating at 4 °C for 3.5 hrs on Fisher tube rotator. Every 45 min (4X total), stop rotation briefly and shake tube vigorously to re-suspend tissue. 03:30:00, rotate at 4 °C 00:45:00, shake vigorously

steps.title: After 3
steps.instruction: After 3.5 hours, transfer digest mix to 15 mL conical & add 10 mL ice-cold DPBS to dilute trypsin mix. Re-suspend digest mix. undetermined, ice-cold DPBS

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min...
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C to pellet cells and tissue chunks. Remove supernatant. 00:05:00, spin 300 g 4 °C

steps.title: After tissue chunks have settled to...
steps.instruction: After tissue chunks have settled to bottom of tube, transfer 75% of supernatant, containing released cells onto 30 µM filter on 50 mL conical. Rinse filter with 6 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Save filter and flow-through for next steps. undetermined, pipet off supernatant undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: To tissue clumps at bottom of...
steps.instruction: To tissue clumps at bottom of tube, add 1 mL bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix. Triturate 10X. undetermined, bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix

steps.title: Continue incubating on ice in bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix
steps.instruction: Continue incubating on ice in bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix. Shake every minute and triturate 10X every 2 min for 15 additional minutes (3 hr. 45 min total time) until the majority of clumps are broken up. 00:15:00, incubate on ice 00:02:00, triturate 10x every 2 min

steps.title: Transfer entire volume of digest mix...
steps.instruction: Transfer entire volume of digest mix to the same 30 µM filter. Rinse filter with 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Re-suspend and transfer flow-through containing cells to 15 mL conical
steps.instruction: Re-suspend and transfer flow-through containing cells to 15 mL conical.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove supernatant (down to ~100 µL) and leave in 15 mL conical. 00:05:00, 300 g for 5 min 4 °C

steps.title: Add 1 mL RBC lysis buffer;...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL RBC lysis buffer; triturate 20X; let sit 2 min. on ice. undetermined, RBC lysis buffer 00:02:00, incubate on ice

steps.title: After 2 min
steps.instruction: After 2 min., add 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% and re-suspend cells. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Spin 1800 RPM (low-speed spin) for...
steps.instruction: Spin 1800 RPM (low-speed spin) for 3 minutes at 4 °C to pellet cells and leave the majority of debris in supernatant. 00:03:00, spin 1800 RPM 4 °C

steps.title: Remove supernatant; re-suspend cells in ~100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant; re-suspend cells in ~100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% and analyze using hemocytometer with trypan blue. Adjust cell concentration to 1,000 cells/µL for Chromium or 100 cells/µL for DropSeq. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Re-suspend cells and tissue in 1...
steps.instruction: Re-suspend cells and tissue in 1 mL ice-cold DPBS and transfer to 1.5 mL tube. Let chunks settle one minute on ice (released cells should remain in supernatant). 00:01:00, let chunks settle on ice

steps.title: Add re-suspended cells to new 30...
steps.instruction: Add re-suspended cells to new 30 µM filter on 50 mL conical; rinse filter with 7 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
